CheckTitle: Detect service principals with expired credentials
Description: Checks for service principals with password or certificate credentials that have already expired. Expired credentials on service principals indicate poor lifecycle management.
Risk: Service principals with expired credentials may be abandoned or poorly maintained. These SPs may still have granted permissions that could be exploited if new credentials are added. Expired credentials also indicate incomplete cleanup after credential rotation.

Remediation.Recommendation: Remove expired credentials from service principals. If the service principal is still in use, rotate credentials. If it is no longer needed, delete it.

SourceNotes: Credential cleanup is essential service principal hygiene.
